","jsFunctions":"(function(){var c=document.getElementById('c');var ctx=c.getContext('2d');ctx.strokeStyle='#38bdf8';ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(150,200);ctx.lineTo(150,50);ctx.stroke();ctx.strokeStyle='#f472b6';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(150,200);ctx.lineTo(50,230);ctx.stroke();ctx.strokeStyle='#a3e635';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(150,200);ctx.lineTo(270,230);ctx.stroke();ctx.fillStyle='#94a3b8';ctx.font='12px system-ui';ctx.fillText('Y (up)',155,48);ctx.fillText('X (right)',240,248);ctx.fillText('Z (depth)',30,248);ctx.fillStyle='#e2e8f0';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(130,120);ctx.lineTo(170,120);ctx.lineTo(190,140);ctx.lineTo(110,140);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(145,90);ctx.lineTo(155,90);ctx.lineTo(155,120);ctx.lineTo(145,120);ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();})();"}
